place: Laem Sor, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Sea-View Villa in Laem Sor
blurb: A serene six-bedroom hillside villa above Laem Sor on Koh Samui's quiet southern coast — Siamese-accented white interiors under high arched ceilings, an L-shaped infinity pool over the Gulf, a Balinese sala, and stone steps straight down to a private beach.
detail:
Descend a stone staircase and you're greeted by a sanctuary wrapped in lush greenery and a vista of seemingly endless cerulean water — a tropical hideaway atop the unmarred hillside of Laem Sor on Koh Samui's southern coast, a short drive from the restaurants and beach of Lamai. Inside, a warm and inviting ambiance unfolds: traditional Siamese adornments set against crisp white walls and high arched ceilings, with wide cushioned couches indoors and comfortable wooden seating out.

The heart of the home is an L-shaped infinity pool that seems to spill toward the Gulf of Thailand, framed by uninterrupted views over the neighbouring Thong Krut fishing village. Six en-suite bedrooms — two masters, three guest rooms and a self-contained studio apartment — sleep up to 12 adults and 2 children, each finished with terraces, dressing areas and bathtubs or rain showers, ideal for families and gatherings.

A Balinese outdoor sala, extensive terracing, a fully equipped professional kitchen, a gym, and a beachfront barbecue area round out the villa, with kayaks and paddleboards for the water. Right at the edge of the property, stone steps lead down to a private beach of rock pools and formations. A team of four including a private chef looks after every detail, with daily breakfast, housekeeping and a villa manager to arrange island excursions.
